description: Unified open-items register — ADC-SYS-001. Every open engineering item across all product documents, with cross-product gating made explicit. CDU items carry ADC-assigned IDs (CDU-G*) because the source BOM lists its release gates unnumbered.

items.title: Confirm OCP 102-inch metric typo (2210 vs 2590.91 mm) before metric drawings
items.status: RESOLVED 2026-06-11 — typo confirmed against the OCP source PDF (Table 18.2.1 prints 2210mm; Figure 18.3.1 prints 2590.91; 102 in = 2,590.8 mm exact, and 2,210 mm = 87 in would be narrower than the 90-in post centers it encloses). Inch values govern; ADC metric drawings print 2,590.8 mm. Proof: ops/research/2026-06-11-hac-oi-02-ocp-102in-metric-typo.md

items.title: Cluster white-space electrical: busway + tap-box vendor selection and catalog confirmation (Starline T5 600 A first source, verified current 2026-06-11; Vertiv PowerBar iMPB alternate)
items.status: catalog refinement 2026-06-11: published T5 guides list no 600 A frame - the 600 A class is the 630T5 Global system, rated 415 V (matches the cluster 415/240 Wye; US frames are 600 V-class). Confirm 630T5 Global catalog numbers with the Starline/Legrand rep. Source: ops/research/2026-06-11-starline-t5-busway-weights.md

items.title: RPP fault/AIC rating + upstream 4-source topology (UPS/gen redundancy >= feed redundancy per Deschutes Table 18.8.1)
Busduct + tap-box weights as load input to the LA-PE HAC structural analysis (8x 600 A runs + 64 boxes on cross-aisle beams)
items.status: design-load input ISSUED 2026-06-11 into the LA-PE SOW from published Starline data (envelope 15.5 lbs/ft per run + 64x 25 lb tap boxes; ~20 lbs/ft combined; sources: ops/research/2026-06-11-starline-t5-busway-weights.md). Note: no 600T5 frame exists in published guides - 600 A class = 630T5 Global, 415 V (matches the 415/240 Wye; feeds ELE-OI-01 catalog confirmation). Item closes when vendor weights are confirmed with the E1/E2 quotes
